description: Busca cursos de Programación Siemens por tema (TIA Portal, SCL, AWL, WinCC, HMI...). Vacío = todos.

description.name: get_course
description.description: Ficha completa de un curso: descripción, precio, qué incluye.

description.name: get_curriculum
description.description: Temario completo de un curso (módulos y lecciones). Sin contenido de pago.

description.name: get_author
description.description: Bio y credenciales del instructor Iñigo Gútiez.

description.name: get_buy_url
description.description: URL de compra/landing de un curso.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search_posts, get_post, get_latest_posts, get_category_posts, get_buy_url · Public sink: get_post.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search_posts, get_post, get_latest_posts, get_category_posts, get_buy_url · Public sink: get_post

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
